title: JWT should be signed and verified
description: This rule checks if JSON Web Tokens (JWT) are properly signed and verified.
message: JWT should be both signed and verified.
impact: Unauthenticated users could gain access to sensitive resources.
recommendation: Use libraries that handle JWT signing and verification correctly.

noncompliant.description: A JWT is encoded with a secret key but not verified.

compliant.description: A JWT is both encoded and verified with a secret key.

why_is_this_an_issue: Unsigned JWTs can be easily forged, leading to unauthorized access. Unverified JWTs could contain malicious payloads.
how_to_fix: Always sign and verify JWTs using a library that handles the signing and verification process correctly.

metadata.title: JWT should be signed and verified
